event: Spring launch increased public traffic and feature-flag evaluations across several product surfaces
Resolve latency and cache miss alerts fired in the flag control plane
The first investigation loop focused on PostgreSQL because database CPU and lock waits rose sharply
CDN probes stayed healthy while cache hit rate collapsed, shifting focus from config propagation to control-plane caching
Recent commits and invalidation metrics linked namespace wildcard invalidation to mass cache refill and retry amplification
Cache hit rate, database load, and stale-config serving began recovering after rollback
